chapter_title.en: Chapter on Oaths, Vows, and Expiations

text: 4287 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "اَلتَّقِيَّةُ فِي كُلِّ ضَرُورَةٍ وَ صَاحِبُهَا أَعْلَمُ بِهَا حِينَ تَنْزِلُ بِهِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4287 - Abu Abdillah (as) said: "Taqiyyah (dissimulation) is in every situation of necessity, and the one facing it knows best when it arises."
